title: geranium blattarium
intro: Geranium blattarium, also known as the Geranium, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Geranium blattarium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system, while also exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Geranium blattarium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
